body.subject: ={{`✅ CMPO Stock Sync: ${$json.existing_updated} updated, ${$json.new_inserted} new`}}
body.html:
={{`

✅ CMPO / LLExeter Stock Sync Complete

${$json.new_skipped_cap > 0 ? '' : ''}${($json.stock_errors + $json.new_errors) > 0 ? '' : ''}
Total SKUs in LLExeter catalogue${$json.total_in_stocklist}
Existing products — stock updated${$json.existing_updated}
New products found${$json.new_found}
New products inserted${$json.new_inserted}
⚠️ New SKUs deferred (run cap)' + $json.new_skipped_cap + '
Skipped — discontinued${$json.skipped_discontinued}
Skipped — under £20${$json.skipped_price}
Skipped — fasteners${$json.skipped_fastener}
❌ Errors' + ($json.stock_errors + $json.new_errors) + '

Ran at: ${$json.run_at} · Next run in ~6h

`}}
